composio_raw.name: Neo4J
composio_raw.description: Graph database platform for connected data and real-time analytics

llm_raw.description: A high-performance graph database management system designed to store, manage, and query highly connected data structures.
llm_raw.notes: Authentication typically uses HTTP Basic Auth or Bearer tokens via the Neo4j Bolt protocol or REST API. The app is widely used in agentic workflows for RAG and knowledge graph construction, supported by the official Neo4j MCP server.
